name: Spiced, Apple & Ginger
title: Spiced Rum, Apple & Ginger Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Spiced Rum, Apple & Ginger | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A simple highball cocktail blending BACARDÍ Spiced rum with apple juice, ginger ale, and optional bitters for a crisp seasonal drink.
marketing_description: Keep seasonal celebrations simple with BACARDÍ Spiced rum, apple juice and ginger ale. The tang of BACARDÍ Spiced and ginger ale complements the sweetness of fresh apple juice.

steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Build all liquid ingredients into the glass, squeeze a wedge of lime and add Angostura bitters if desired.
Garnish with another lime wedge or an apple slice.

garnish: another lime wedge or an apple slice
raw_text_excerpt: How to make a Spiced, Apple & Ginger 50 ml BACARDÍ Spiced rum 50 ml apple juice 50 ml ginger ale 2 dashes Angostura® bitters (optional) 1 lime wedge(s) 1 Chill Fill a highball glass with ice. 2 Build Build all liquid ingredients into the glass, squeeze a wedge of lime and add Angostura bitters if desired. 3 Stir Stir to combine. 4 Garnish Garnish with another lime wedge or an apple slice.

source_metadata.description: Learn how to make the best Spiced, Apple & Ginger Cocktail. Check out our BACARDÍ receipe and ingredient list here and start mixing!
